case_title: JOE NATHAN HOMER VS. CIRCUIT CITY STORES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HOMER, JOE NATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT CIRCUIT CITY STORES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMER, JOE NATHAN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-24-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CIRCUIT CITY STORES, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY HOMER, JOE NATHAN CIRCUIT CITY STORES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CIRCUIT CITY STORES, INC.

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. THE PARTIES APPEARED AND PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT CIRCUIT CITY HAD ALREADY PROVIDED A REPLACEMENT COMPUTER AND HE AGREED TO DISMISS SUIT IN LIGHT OF SUCH. JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
